title: ChestRoulette
description: Adds random spawn points and bonus chests for each player in Minecraft!
body:
Adds random spawn points and bonus chests for each player in Minecraft!

![ChestRoulette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3aa4504ca4bf3233df17a95bf620e7937e4479.png)
**You have to disable "Bonus Chest" to make the mod/datapack work!**
# Features
**🌎 Random Spawn**

Say goodbye to predictability! With ChestRoulette random spawn, each new beginning in Minecraft is a completely fresh adventure. Explore unknown lands and uncover new challenges as you are launched into unexpected locations across the world.


```
Use the command "/function cr:random" so that all players currently online are taken to a new location.
```


**🧰 Bonus Chest for everyone**

Kickstart your journey with a personal surprise! With ChestRoulette, each player is greeted with their own bonus chest.


**✨ Compatibility**

I recommend the datapack [Various Starting Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/various-starting-loot). It adjusts the bonus chest loot based on the initial biome. Compatible with Terralith biomes.

![loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cs85BmwR/images/fc8a579202ed78a8759cb20c438d85d518ec6d43.png)
